testcase.name: login page has correct form elements
login form is properly visible on mobile viewport
Home page should work in all browsers
testcase.system-out: Testing Home page in chromium Going to / Page title: Pixelated Empathy | Clinical simulation for therapist training and supervision - Pixelated Empathy

testcase.name: Blog page should work in all browsers
testcase.system-out: Testing Blog page in chromium Going to /blog Page title: Blog - Pixelated Empathy

testcase.name: Documentation page should work in all browsers
testcase.system-out: Testing Documentation page in chromium Going to /docs Page title: Getting Started with Pixelated Empathy - Pixelated Empathy

testcase.name: CSS feature support check
testcase.system-out: CSS features support in chromium: { flexbox: [33mtrue[39m, grid: [33mtrue[39m, variables: [33mtrue[39m, sticky: [33mtrue[39m, animations: [33mtrue[39m, filters: [33mtrue[39m, aspectRatio: [33mtrue[39m }
